name: Pleng Ruk Pleng Bpeun
original_name: เพลงรักเพลงปืน
overview: Two guys who grew up in a temple are misunderstood as jailbirds. They come back, then meet a tomboyish girl and a undercover policewoman who disguised herself for an investigation. At first the four are enemies, but later romantic relationships are developed.

trailers.title: เพลงรักเพลงปืน [Official Teaser]
